title: Create new version (rebuild/refresh current state)

requirements.text: Rebuild and redeploy the current application as a new version, preserving all existing functionality including the DuckDuckGo search interface, in-app browser modal, error handling, and Google Search Console verification file.
acceptanceCriteria: A new version is successfully built and deployed
All existing search functionality remains intact
The in-app browser modal continues to work as before
Error states and loading states display correctly
The Google Search Console verification file remains accessible

nonGoals: Adding new features beyond what currently exists
Changing the DNS configuration or adding TXT records
Modifying the search provider from DuckDuckGo
